query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a key suspended vertically within a keyhole-shaped beam of light against a solid black background. The key has a long shaft with a rectangular, notched bit at the top and a circular bow at the bottom, illuminated by a tapered glow that narrows around the key and widens into a soft oval toward the upper edge of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of a key suspended vertically within a keyhole-shaped beam of light against a solid black background, rendered with heavy analog film grain that creates a textured, organic surface across the illuminated areas. The key has a long shaft with a rectangular, notched bit at the top and a circular bow at the bottom, illuminated by a tapered glow that narrows around the key and widens into a soft oval toward the upper edge of the frame.
